note: locked_in AMCs should NOT need re-derivation of their extraction method in future runs — the hint_method breakdown here documents exactly what worked. open AMCs list a specific diagnosis + suggested fix where known; apply and re-run scripts/bulk/parse.ts + map-schemes.ts to pick up the fix.

Abakkus Mutual Fund.method_description: Workbook has an 'Index'-named tab mapping short tab-codes to full scheme names (2-3 col table); data sheets are named by that code. Build code->name map, strip trailing parenthetical description.

360 ONE Mutual Fund.diagnosis: early_text grabbing 'Industry / Rating' / 'Market/Fair Value(Rs. in Lacs)' column headers — same boilerplate-regex gap as Invesco/HDFC.

sample_scheme_names:
Capitalmind Liquid Fund
(An open-ended Liquid scheme. A relatively low-interest rate risk and relatively low credit risk fund)

Capitalmind Flexi Cap Fund
(An open-ended dynamic equity scheme investing across large cap, mid cap & small cap stocks)

Capitalmind Multi Asset Allocation Fund
(An open-ended scheme investing in equity and equity related instruments, debt and money market instruments, Commodities including Exchange Traded Commodity Derivatives)
Capitalmind Mutual Fund.diagnosis: Same root cause as Helios — label_in_sheet needs parenthetical-description stripping.

Groww Mutual Fund.diagnosis: Hint has a glued short-code prefix ('IB02-Groww Liquid Fund') from early_text — likely same prefix-stripping fix as The Wealth Company.

HDFC Mutual Fund.diagnosis: early_text grabbing a column-header cell ('Coupon (%)') instead of the scheme name — sheet's actual name is elsewhere (not in first multi-word cell). Needs EARLY_TEXT_BOILERPLATE_RE extended with 'coupon' and a look further into the row/sheet for the real title, likely via a still-unrecognized label variant.

sample_scheme_names: Helios Small Cap Fund (Small Cap Fund - An open-ended equity scheme predominantly investing in small cap stocks)
Helios Overnight Fund  (An open ended debt scheme investing in overnight securities. Relatively low interest rate risk and relatively low credit risk)

Helios Flexi Cap Fund (An open-ended dynamic equity scheme investing across large cap, 
mid cap & small cap stocks)
Helios Mutual Fund.diagnosis: label_in_sheet finds the label correctly but doesn't strip the trailing parenthetical scheme-type description ('Helios Small Cap Fund (Small Cap Fund - An open-ended...)'), polluting the mfapi query. Needs the same split('(')[0] cleanup buildIndexMap already applies.

Invesco Mutual Fund.diagnosis: early_text grabbing 'Market/Fair Value (Rs. in Lakhs)' column header. Needs EARLY_TEXT_BOILERPLATE_RE extended with 'market/fair value' — currently only catches 'exchange traded'/'name of the instrument' phrasing, not this column-header wording.

JM Financial Mutual Fund.diagnosis: early_text grabbing 'Quantity/Face Value' column header — same boilerplate-regex gap.

NJ Mutual Fund.diagnosis: Hints look clean ('NJ Flexi Cap Fund') but coverage is 0% — not a hint-extraction problem. Needs live investigation of the mfapi AMC-name match path (possible NJ isn't well-indexed on mfapi, or inferAmcName's fallback mismatches on some variant).

sample_scheme_names: PGIM INDIA AGGRESSIVE HYBRID EQUITY FUND
PGIM India Mutual Fund.diagnosis: Hints look clean (100% early_text, e.g. 'PGIM INDIA BALANCED ADVANTAGE FUND') but only 43.2% map — genuinely needs live investigation (not an obvious hint-quality bug); may be partial mfapi coverage of PGIM schemes or a scoring-threshold edge case.

PPFAS Mutual Fund.diagnosis: Mixed: ~50% of sheets get early_text column-header noise ('Industry / Rating', 'Market/Fair Value...') same as the Invesco/360-ONE gap; the other half (index_sheet_lookup/label_in_sheet) map fine (see Baroda-BNP-style entries for those methods' quality elsewhere).

sample_scheme_names: WCSC-THE WEALTH COMPANY SMALL CAP FUND
WCFL-THE WEALTH COMPANY FLEXI CAP FUND
The Wealth Company Mutual Fund.diagnosis: Hint includes an ungled short-code prefix ('WCSC-THE WEALTH COMPANY SMALL CAP FUND') that survives cleanup and may be diluting the mfapi query token match — needs a prefix-code stripper (pattern: 2-6 uppercase letters + '-' at the very start).

Trust Mutual Fund.diagnosis: Hints look clean ('TRUSTMF Liquid Fund') but coverage is 5.8% — likely an AMC-name-match issue: inferAmcName's fallback needs a 'TRUSTMF' -> 'Trust Mutual Fund' regex added to AMC_HINTS in lib/mfapi.ts, since 'TRUSTMF' as a prefix won't fuzzy-match 'Trust' without it.

Unifi Mutual Fund.diagnosis: early_text grabbing 'Name of Instrument' column header — same boilerplate-regex gap (needs 'name of instrument' variant without 'the').

sample_scheme_names: Union Mutual Fund - Registration No. MF/066/11/01
Union Mutual Fund - Registration No. MF/066/11/01
Union Mutual Fund - Registration No. MF/066/11/01
Union Mutual Fund.diagnosis: early_text grabbing AMC registration boilerplate ('Union Mutual Fund - Registration No. MF/066/11/01') — the bare-AMC-name guard only rejects an exact match, not AMC-name-plus-registration-text. Needs a broader 'starts with AMC name' check or a 'registration no' boilerplate pattern.

Zerodha Mutual Fund.diagnosis: early_text grabbing 'Rating / Industry' column header — same boilerplate-regex gap.
